emails.subject: Q1 Configuration Audit - Action Required
emails.body:
Hi Alice,

As part of our Q1 compliance review, we need to conduct a configuration audit on the development servers. I'm assigning this to you since you have the necessary access.

Here's what we need:

1. Review the SSH daemon configuration and the network settings - you'll find these in the usual system config directory (/etc). Specifically look at sshd_config and network.conf.

2. Compare these against our security baseline policy (it's in /policies/security_baseline.txt) and identify any deviations.

3. Create backups of the current configs before we make any changes - put them in /backups.

4. Write up a hardening recommendations report documenting what needs to be fixed. Save it to your reports folder.

This is for the compliance team, so please be thorough. Once you're done, send me the full report via email and post a quick summary to the #security-audits channel so the team knows where we stand.

Let me know if you have any questions.

Thanks,
Marcus Chen
Security Lead
